task_yaml.task:
Quarterly team retrospective time — I want to review how a few
issue-view-related PRs in cli/cli progressed over the years. Could you
produce a markdown report with a Mermaid diagram?

These three PRs have all been merged:

- https://github.com/cli/cli/pull/2462   samcoe added issue comment view in late 2020
- https://github.com/cli/cli/pull/3196   g14a added search to issue list in early 2021
- https://github.com/cli/cli/pull/10941  iamazeem expanded JSON fields in 2025

For each PR I want: basic info (author, created/merged timestamps, how
many lines and files changed), top 5 most-changed files, who reviewed
it, and how long it took from creation to merge (in hours).

Fetch PR data with gh from the GitHub API. Draw a Mermaid diagram
visualizing the lifecycle of all three PRs — pick whatever chart type
makes the 2020-to-2025 evolution timeline clear, and render it with
mmdc.

Also write a Chinese narrative doing a cross-comparison: which was
fastest, which had the biggest diff. Estimate the discussion vibe from
comments — roughly how many questions / approvals / suggestions, and
which PR had the most heated discussion.

Put all artifacts under /tmp_workspace/results/. Save the structured
data for the three PRs as pr_summary.json, the Mermaid source as
pr_flow.mmd rendered to pr_flow.png (svg is fine too). Write a final
pr_doc.md markdown report titled "cli/cli 季度 PR 复盘" that embeds
the Mermaid diagram, the Chinese narrative, and the most-changed file
lists for each PR.
